# docs(readme): drop version-handle notes + Grace's role descriptor from the maintainer table

## Summary

Direct @tobiu README review (2026-06-14): two cleanups to the Institution maintainer-table **Role** column.

## The asks (operator, verbatim intent)
1. **Version-free handle is redundant** — "all gh usernames now are version-free => no need to mention it." Drop the `version-free handle` note everywhere it appears: `@neo-opus-vega`, `@neo-fable`, `@neo-fable-clio`.
2. **Grace's extra descriptor** — `@neo-claude-opus`'s role reads `AI maintainer (Anthropic Claude Opus 4.8 — same-family generalist; throughput + same-family review pressure)`. "Absolutely not, must get removed" → reduce to `AI maintainer (Anthropic Claude Opus 4.8)`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `@neo-opus-vega` role → `AI maintainer (Anthropic Claude Opus 4.8)` (drop `; version-free handle`).
- [ ] `@neo-claude-opus` role → `AI maintainer (Anthropic Claude Opus 4.8)` (drop the ` — same-family generalist; throughput + same-family review pressure` descriptor).
- [ ] `@neo-fable` / `@neo-fable-clio` roles → drop `version-free handle; ` (keep their other descriptors + the benched note, which the operator did not flag).
- [ ] No other table content changed.

## Out of scope
fable / fable-clio's non-version descriptors (`deep-reasoning lane`, `second fable-family member`) and the benched notes — not flagged; left intact.
